results.goal: High-protein vegetarian advice for this meal.

recommendations: Incorporate lentils or chickpeas into your meal for added protein.
Use quinoa as a base for salads or bowls; it's high in protein.
Add Greek yogurt (lactose-free) for a creamy, protein-rich topping.
Include nuts or seeds, like almonds or chia seeds, for crunch and protein.
Opt for tofu or tempeh as a meat substitute in stir-fries or salads.
Consider adding edamame as a side or snack for extra protein.
Use nutritional yeast as a seasoning for a cheesy flavor and protein boost.
Make a smoothie with protein powder and spinach for a nutritious drink.
Try black beans in tacos or burritos for a protein-packed filling.
